reviews.comment:
Pésimo servicio de atención, hace mas de una semana que estoy intentando comunicarme al único teléfono que tienen disponible y jamás me contestó nadie!!!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible customer service! I've been trying to contact them for over a week on the only phone number they have available and nobody has ever answered!
